title: blechnum finlaysonianum
intro: Blechnum finlaysonianum, also known as the Finlayson's Chain Fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Blechnum finlaysonianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Blechnum finlaysonianum can be made by infusing the plant's leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using a tincture or extract to create a topical application for wound care.
